organizations.role: True Colors Vision in Action Award Honoree (2016)

organizations.role: True Colors Honoree (2016)
organizations.notes: Co-founder of Notley. Honored alongside Dan Graham at ADL Austins 5th annual True Colors: Shake the Hate event.

organizations.role: Board Member; National Jewish Democratic Council secretary

organizations.role: Past Board Chair (4th Chair); National Commissioner; Austin Advisory Board; 2023 Golden Door Awards honoree
organizations.notes: Profile on Revere CRE explicitly lists ADL Austin Past Board Member, Past Chair, National Commissioner, Austin Advisory Board. Confirmed by Shalom Austin Sep 2023 piece ("Choosing Hope in a World of Hate") noting Jeff served as ADL Austin's 4th board chair. Honored with Val Newberg at 2023 ADL Austin Golden Door Awards Dinner (Oct 30, 2023). Disambiguation: Velasquez donor employer "Endeavor Real Estate Group" matches Newberg's role as co-founder/Managing Principal of Endeavor.

organizations.role: board member — provider of pipeline compliance, cathodic protection and data-transmission solutions for the oil and gas industry (HMI acquisition)
organizations.notes: Anne Meinig Smalling has been President/Managing Partner of HM International since 1999 and CEO since 2017; HMI is headquartered in Austin, TX and her LinkedIn lists Austin — matching the filing's employer ('HM International') and occupations ('General Manager','Chief Executive Officer'). Cornell '87, Harvard MBA '92; daughter of the late Peter C. Meinig and elected chair of the Cornell Board of Trustees. Her Austin civic role on the Waterloo Greenway board corroborates the local giving (Watson, Velasquez). Significant oil & gas exposure through HMI board seats (below); FEC lean 0.0 across 2 gifts indicates Republican federal giving.
